CustomField.formula: CASE(Bookings_Tier_Attained__c, 'Baseline', Baseline_Bookings_Incremental_Growth__c / Max_Bookings_Payout__c , 'Tier 1', Tier_1_Bookings_Incremental_Growth__c / Max_Bookings_Payout__c , 'Tier 2', Tier_2_Bookings_Incremental_Growth__c / Max_Bookings_Payout__c , 'Tier 3', Tier_3_Bookings_Incremental_Growth__c / Max_Bookings_Payout__c ,0)
CustomField.label: Actual Bookings ROI
